items.titolo: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
items.descrizione: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.

items.titolo: Gmail Live: si possono cercare le email con la voce grazie a Gemini
items.descrizione: Gmail Live permette di cercare le email parlando con Gemini. Funziona per domande complesse. In beta su Android e iOS. The post Gmail Live: si possono cercare le email con la voce grazie a Gemini appeared first on Punto

items.titolo: AI Model Release Tracker: Anthropic releases Sonnet 5
items.descrizione: Not every new model is all it's cracked up to be. Our tracker keeps each release in context with its peers, so you know which models are worth your time.
